core_law: Memory is not storage; memory is controlled influence on the next cycle.
non_claim_lock: The cybernetic memory loop is repository-bound. It does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

title: CMS-SA v0.4.0 - Cybernetic Memory Loop Genesis
